studentTurns: I would start Friend Streaks from the Home habit cards and the Hydration Detail screen. Home makes it discoverable from the main routine, and Hydration Detail makes sense because the user is already focused on one habit.
Home fits because users already scan habit progress there. Hydration Detail fits because it already shows progress, a personal streak, and a Mark Complete action for one habit.
The Shared Streak screen should show the shared habit, both people, and whether each person completed the habit today.
It should also show the current shared streak count and what happens if one person misses a day.
That can help users come back because they can see their friend is counting on them today.
notes: Maya should move the student through the planned sequence without over-explaining.

studentTurns: Two starting places are Home habit cards and Habit Detail. Home helps discovery, Habit Detail connects to one habit. The Shared Streak screen should show both people, the shared habit, today's completion status for each person, and the shared streak count.
I would not start from a public feed because this feature is private between two friends.
The final screen could have a shared streak number, both names, today's check marks, and a small reminder if one person has not finished.
The return motivation is that each person can see the shared streak depends on both of them today.
After this meeting I would turn it into an invitation-based flow from Habit Detail.
notes: Maya should recognize the answer is strong and wrap naturally instead of repeating earlier questions forever.

The screen should show the habit, both users, and whether both completed today.
The return reason is that the shared streak only continues if both people complete the same habit.
notes: Maya should gently correct the feature model and not adopt leaderboard or app-open concepts.

studentTurns: Home.

studentTurns: Home, Habit Detail, Profile, maybe a feed, maybe groups, maybe I would redesign the whole onboarding and make streak rewards and badges and a weekly social ranking.
The two strongest are Home and Habit Detail because they are already connected to habit tracking.
I would avoid the feed and ranking because those make it too social and public.
The final screen should show the shared habit, both people, completion today, and the shared streak count.
It motivates return use because the next action is clear and both friends know what needs to happen today.
notes: Maya should extract useful parts and reject scope creep without following the student into a new product.
